dawning-wheat.caption: Dawning Wheat
dawning-wheat.description: Capturing warm light to the East in my grandparent's field.

sunrise-panorama.caption: Panoramic Sunrise
sunrise-panorama.description: An image of the sunrise. 4 photos stitched together in Photoshop.

milky-way.caption: Milky Way Composite #1
milky-way.description: A view of the Milky Way looking South from my Grandparents' yard. Edited in Photoshop.

leaf-pile.caption: Leaf Pile
leaf-pile.description: We gathered lots of leaves from the street into garbage bags. Linda was curious.

lukas-chop.caption: Making a Catapult
lukas-chop.description: Lukas using a machete to break down a stool. We were attempting to make a catapult.

lukas-dap.caption: Lukas Stance
lukas-dap.description: Lukas posing for a photo after playing in the leaves.

lukas-pedalboard.caption: Lukas and His 'Pedalboard'
lukas-pedalboard.description: An experimental photo of Lukas' pedalboard. It's made out of a shoebox!

room-of-ideas.caption: Room Of Ideas
room-of-ideas.description: An abstract photo depicting the brilliance of the ideas that come out of Lukas' room and mind.

first-show.caption: First Show
first-show.description: This was the first time we held a show in the garage. We made our debut along with From Within and Monarch. They signed the wall of the garage afterward. It's still there today.

recording-in-garage.caption: Recording In Garage
recording-in-garage.description: Setting up for recording in the garage.

lukas-onboard.caption: Ready for Recording
lukas-onboard.description: Lukas at his workstation. We recorded a lot of music in the garage. It was his favorite spot.

day-after-show.caption: The Aftermath
day-after-show.description: Taken just after the show. It doesn't capture the broken glass or the mess.
